Nathan Lukes pinch-hit · Sac Fly Double Play
notableEvents.detail: Nathan Lukes flies into a sacrifice double play, right fielder Tristan Peters to first baseman Munetaka Murakami to third baseman Miguel Vargas. Myles Straw scores. Tyler Heineman out at 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error vs Luisangel Acuña
notableEvents.detail: Bot 8 · Luisangel Acuña singles on a ground ball to second baseman Ernie Clement. Miguel Vargas scores. Austin Hays scores. Throwing error by catcher Tyler Heineman, assist to second baseman Ernie Clement to third baseman Kazuma Okamoto. Luisangel Acuña out at 3rd on the throw, left fielder Myles Straw to shortstop Andrés Giménez.
